title: BigBear.ai (NYSE: BBAI) Stock Slips After Hours Despite Margin Surge and New $53 Million Intelligence Contract
text: BigBear.ai stock slipped after hours despite impressive margin surge and new $53 million intelligence contract win. The after-hours decline following earnings release reflects that investors are discounting the operational improvements due to concerns about profitability and cash burn. The significant classified contract award demonstrates the company's ability to win national security business, but failed to offset concerns about near-term financial performance.
